LanguageData.RSMF.Settings.ShowCustomerArrivalMessage: When disabled, the message that customers are heading to a shop will no longer be shown.
LanguageData.RSMF.Settings.ShowCustomerInspectDetails: When disabled, customer runtime parameters will not be appended to the pawn inspect panel.
LanguageData.RSMF.Settings.EnableCustomerReviewsTip: Reviews are generated on customer departure by sample rate only after a valid API connection is configured.
LanguageData.RSMF.Settings.ReviewStatusLine: Status: {state} Sample: {sampleRate}% Rate limit: {rpm}/min Timeout: {timeout}s Context budget: {chars} chars
LanguageData.RSMF.Settings.DebugForcedCustomerKindTip: When enabled, natural and forced customer spawns prefer this customer kind. Empty restores normal weighted random selection.
LanguageData.RSMF.QuickGoodsRegister.DesignatorDesc: Drag over items on the map and quickly append their ThingDefs to a goods category so shelves and shop systems can sell them.
LanguageData.RSMF.QuickGoodsRegister.Title: Quick register goods
LanguageData.RSMF.QuickGoodsRegister.Summary: Selected {count} registerable goods. Choose the goods category they should belong to.
LanguageData.RSMF.QuickGoodsRegister.NoCategories: No goods categories are available. Create or load categories in the custom goods registry first.
LanguageData.RSMF.QuickGoodsRegister.NoValidItems: No registerable goods were found in the selected area.
LanguageData.RSMF.QuickGoodsRegister.AllExisting: Those goods are already in the target category.
